# Skill: dotnet-best-practices

## Goal
Provide practical .NET 9 and C# 13 implementation guidance.

## Use When
- Designing backend services or endpoint handlers.
- Refactoring for readability, reliability, or testability.

## Checklist
- Nullable correctness.
- Validation and authorization enforced.
- Async usage and cancellation support.
- Targeted tests for core behavior.
